item.title: Home
item.content:encoded:
Ashley Garcia

What is it?

I created this customizable intro using Apple Motion.

Apple Motion is used to create and edit motion graphics, titles, and effects for video and film production. It is similar to Adobe After Effects. Although I am very comfortable using Apple Motion, I can assure you that transitioning to Adobe After Effects won’t be difficult.

Why?

I created this customizable intro to challenge myself in “familiarity”. By that I mean, I wanted to created something that looks accurate and similar to the real thing. That way it gives the viewer a sense of familiarity,

Skills

  • Microsoft Word

  • Microsoft PowerPoint

  • Canva

  • Final Cut Pro (inspired)

In this personal project, I recreated my favorite apps. Some are near replicas and others have a twist. It was a very fun project that taught me the difficulties that come in creating vector art. I thought this project would be the PERFECT addition to showcase my skillset. However, this is not an exhaustive list since I also am skilled in:

  • Apple Motion (Motion Graphics)

  • Linearity (Vector Art)

  • Procreate (Digital Art)

As a child I enjoyed photo albums. This was my gateway adoration to journaling. After years of using composition books for my writing, I have succumb to taking my journaling off-paper and going digital.

Thus, giving myself the opportunity to create my own planners and templates completely through Canva and Procreate.

Here is sample of one of my favorites.

What you saw is only a fragment of my work. The rest are safely glued into my scrapbook. Come take a deep dive into my small cove of creativity by clicking the button below.

See More

item.title: About
item.content:encoded:
Who Am I?

Thank you for your curiosity about me, it’s refreshing. I won’t keep you waiting. First of all, you already know my name because … well, it’s on my homepage, résumé, domain, and birth certificate (hopefully). I’m proud of my name, but I think nicknames are cute so call me, Ash.

I’m a creative. Every month I pick up a new hobby, simply because it brings me joy. I enjoy video editing, content creating, singing, crocheting, journaling, and much more. My goal in life is to find a place that can nurture my creativity and ambition. Nice to meet you.

P.S. This is my favorite outfit. You will see me wear it and its many seasonal variations throughout the office. (One of the many perks of working with me)

item.title: Contact
item.content:encoded:
Contact Me

If you have any comments, questions, or constructive criticism, please send me an email. I can’t wait to hear from you!

ash.g30@outlook.com

item.title: Scrapbook
item.content:encoded:
Digital Scrapbook

Welcome to my digital scrapbook! Below, you will find various personal projects. They range from art, content creation, video editing, and design. I love to create new things therefore, this page will be updated frequently to showcase my newest creations. Enjoy!
